stemHtml: West of Friedrichshafen at 5500 ft. What is the correct position report?

options.a: Fastair 123, Friedrichshafen Tower, altitude 5500 ft, 10 minutes west.
options.b: Friedrichshafen Tower, Fastair 123, position 10 minutes west of Friedrichshafen, altitude 5500 ft.
options.c: Friedrichshafen Tower, Fastair 123, altitude 5500 ft, 10 minutes west.
options.d: Fastair 123, Friedrichshafen Tower, 10 minutes west, altitude 5500 ft.
